no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: Targeted bead tests pass, but `lefthook run pre-commit` fails in the repository-wide `go test -short -race ./internal/agent` step on unrelated existing tests (`TestExecuteBead_ArtifactsCreated`, `TestExecuteBead_ManifestShape`, `TestCancelLatency_UnderSLA`) before a clean commit can be made. Follow-up needs repo-level test stabilization or hook narrowing; this bead's no-viable-provider coverage is already in place in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go`.
